command:
echo "############ SAKURA ROUTE PRE-FLIGHT (steady state) ############"

echo ""
echo "=== HOP 1-2: Telegram's view of the webhook (where it will deliver) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -m json.tool"

echo ""
echo "=== HOP 2: Cloudflare edge - DNS resolution of sakura.cutegrafiks.com ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "getent hosts sakura.cutegrafiks.com; echo '---'; curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'GET edge: %{http_code} via %{remote_ip}\n' --max-time 8 https://sakura.cutegrafiks.com/ 2>/dev/null"

echo ""
echo "=== HOP 3: cloudflared tunnel replicas - both up? ==="
echo -n ".191 cloudflared: "; systemctl is-active cloudflared
echo -n ".201 cloudflared: "; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 "systemctl is-active cloudflared"

echo ""
echo "=== HOP 3: tunnel ingress route for sakura (the destination mapping) ==="
sudo journalctl -u cloudflared --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "sakura|202:8080" | tail -2 || echo "(token-mode: route from CF dashboard: sakura.cutegrafiks.com -> 192.168.0.202:8080)"

echo ""
echo "=== HOP 4: vm-hermes .202 gateway listening + healthy ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "echo -n 'gateway active: '; systemctl is-active hermes-gateway; echo -n 'port 8080: '; ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -c 8080; echo -n 'webhook secret in env: '; sudo grep -c TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service"

echo ""
echo "=== HOP 4: Sakura's mention-gating config (what will she respond to) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "grep -A5 '^telegram:' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml"

echo ""
echo "=== HOP 5: model backend reachable from .202 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'ollama .39:11434: %{http_code}\n' --max-time 8 http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null"

echo ""
echo "=== Current gateway.log line count (baseline for the test) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "wc -l /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log"
